DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT MARK SHAFFER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO CURE DEFECT. 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO CONFORM TO RULING. JUDGE: DAVID A. GARCIA, Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780, (DAG/301)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Judge Herbert Donaldson, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Valejo, CSR. Lavon Granger.
Michael rossoff, Esq., for Plaintiff Neveo Mosser.
Defendant, Mark Shaffer present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by written stipulation.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Stipulation for judgment filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
